summary: REQ-1 and REQ-2 appear implemented: App now uses a localStorage-backed persisted click counter, displays the count in the UI while the button is visible, prevents increments during explosion, and keeps the explosion trigger at exactly 1000 clicks. However, the diff also includes unrelated changes/files (not requested), including a modification to the Internet Identity hook and additions of project metadata/summaries.

hallucinated_features.description: Unrequested modifications to Internet Identity authentication hook (could affect non-goal: do not change Internet Identity behavior).
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest explicitly lists changing Internet Identity behavior as a non-goal; yet this file was modified and the diff summary does not tie it to click counter display/persistence.
Not requested by the BuildRequest; appears to be internal/project bookkeeping rather than implementing click counter display/persistence.

hallucinated_features.description: Added frontend file summaries text file.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by the BuildRequest; appears to be auxiliary documentation/output.
